title: Burning Ban Implemented in Charlotte Region Due to Drought
summary: Local fire marshals ban open burning within 100 feet of dwellings due to drought and wildfire risks.
charlotte_impact: Reduces wildfire risk, protects property and lives during dry conditions. Impacts outdoor activities and construction.

title: North Carolina Enacts Statewide Open Burning Ban
summary: North Carolina issues a statewide open burning ban, canceling existing permits and suspending new ones in all 100 counties.
charlotte_impact: Addresses heightened wildfire risk across the state, affecting agricultural practices and outdoor events.

title: 'No Kings' Protests Held Across the Carolinas
summary: Thousands gather in North and South Carolina for 'No Kings' demonstrations against President Trump.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing political dissent and concerns about government corruption and leadership during Trump's presidency.

title: Clear and Cold Weather Forecast for Charlotte
summary: Clear and cold tonight with frost by Sunday morning. Sunny and nice Sunday, still in the 60s.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather information relevant to planning outdoor activities and preparing for temperature changes.

title: Driver Charged After Hitting Woman, Baby in Matthews Crosswalk
summary: Driver charged after striking a woman and baby in a downtown Matthews crosswalk at West John Street and North Trade Street.
charlotte_impact: Highlights pedestrian safety concerns and potential consequences of negligent driving in crosswalks.

title: New Rabies Cases Confirmed in Lincoln County
summary: Lincoln County confirms two new rabies cases from a skunk and a fox, urging pet owners to update rabies vaccinations.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about rabies risks and the importance of pet vaccinations to protect public health.

title: Fatal Crash on I-85 South Claims One Life
summary: A fatal crash on I-85 South near University City Boulevard has resulted in one death, according to Medic.
charlotte_impact: Reports a serious traffic incident, impacting commuters and highlighting road safety concerns on a major highway.

title: Shooting in West Charlotte Injures One
summary: A shooting near Freedom Drive around 2 a.m. in west Charlotte has left one person injured, Medic confirmed.
charlotte_impact: Reports a violent incident, raising concerns about public safety and crime rates in the west Charlotte area.

title: Three Injured in Northeast Charlotte Crash
summary: Three people are hospitalized with serious injuries after a crash in northeast Charlotte early Saturday, according to Medic.
charlotte_impact: Details a significant traffic accident, affecting multiple individuals and requiring emergency medical response.

title: Woman Killed in North Charlotte Apartment Shooting
summary: A woman was shot and killed through her front door at a north Charlotte apartment complex late Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Reports a fatal shooting, raising serious concerns about safety and security in residential areas.

title: Trump Signs Order to Pay TSA, Easing Airport Wait Times
summary: President Trump signed an order to pay TSA workers, offering relief amid long airport wait times due to unpaid agents.
charlotte_impact: Addresses airport delays and worker compensation issues, impacting travel and government operations.

title: Gunfire Hits East Charlotte Restaurant
summary: Gunfire hits an east Charlotte restaurant, surveillance video shows chaotic moments and scared patrons.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the impact of gun violence on local businesses and the community's sense of safety.

title: Kathie Dello: NC's First Female State Climatologist
summary: Kathie Dello was North Carolina's first female state climatologist, serving from 2019 to 2025.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the achievements of women in science and leadership roles within North Carolina's government.

title: Judge Weighs CMPD's Force During 2020 Protests
summary: Judge considers whether CMPD used unlawful force during 2020 protests, examining police conduct.

title: Uptown Redevelopment Project Underway
summary: Uptown redevelopment to bring 448 apartments and new retail near Bank of America Stadium.
